nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Core booking operations (create, confirm, cancel) target 99.9% monthly availability.
nonFunctionalRequirements.measurement: Uptime monitoring via Grafana SLO dashboard

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Failure of any non-core service (notifications, analytics, reporting) must not degrade booking availability.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: Notification and Analytics services are fully decoupled async subscribers. Circuit breakers on synchronous calls to Availability and Payment.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: No event is lost between the time it is written and the time it is consumed, even if a consumer is temporarily unavailable.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: Transactional Outbox — events durable in PostgreSQL until Relay publishes. SQS retains messages for up to 14 days.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Booking confirmation end-to-end latency p95 < 3 seconds.

nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: Served from pre-aggregated Materialized View — O(1) regardless of booking history depth.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: A slot can never be double-booked, regardless of concurrent requests.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: Unique constraint on slot_locks (tenant_id, staff_id, slot_date, slot_start) WHERE released_at IS NULL.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: All derived views are eventually consistent with the event log, with target lag < 5 seconds under normal load.
Replaying events for a tenant produces identical derived state to live processing.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: Idempotent consumers via event_id watermarks and inbox deduplication.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: The platform supports horizontal growth in tenant count without architectural changes.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: Pool tenancy model; event bus partitioned by tenant_id; stateless services scale horizontally.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: A single high-volume tenant cannot degrade performance for other tenants.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: SQS FIFO per-tenant MessageGroupId; dedicated partitions for high-volume tenants; per-tenant throughput quotas.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Tenant data isolation violations must be zero.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: RLS at DB layer, tenant_id namespacing at cache layer, envelope validation at event bus layer.
nonFunctionalRequirements.measurement: Isolation monitor runs every 5 minutes in production

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: All data in transit and at rest is encrypted.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: TLS 1.3 in transit; AES-256 at rest (RDS, S3, SQS, ElastiCache).

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Every event carries a correlation_id traceable across all services.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: API Gateway generates correlation_id; all services propagate via HTTP headers, MDC, and event envelopes.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: A new downstream consumer of booking events can be added without modifying the booking service.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: Pub/Sub via SNS — new SQS subscriber added without touching the producer.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: DLQ entries must be resolved within 4 hours.
nonFunctionalRequirements.measurement: dlq.depth > 0 alert triggers within 5 minutes; resolution tracked in ops console.
